name: Premium Original Big Block Squeez'M Cube – 35% Larger Than The Standard Squishy Cube, Sensory Fidget Toy for Kids & Adults, Stress Relief, Focus & Play – Durable, Gift-Ready – ASTM Certified 3+
bullets: 𝟯𝟱% 𝗕𝗶𝗴𝗴𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 – Meet the Big Block: our largest and most satisfying squishy cube yet. Bigger with more to squeeze, stretch, and enjoy.

𝗘𝘅𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗦𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗳 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲, 𝗦𝗹𝗼𝘄-𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗦𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗼𝗿𝘆 𝗙𝗲𝗲𝗱𝗯𝗮𝗰𝗸 – Enjoy resistance and satisfying squish with our premium slow-rise gel core and tear-resistant outer shell – perfect for kids, teens, and adults. Extra firm – Frequently used as a physical therapy stress ball.
𝗖𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗱-𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲 & 𝗔𝘀𝘁𝗺 𝗙𝟵𝟲𝟯 𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱 – Crafted from non-toxic, BPA-free materials that meet rigorous U.S. toy safety standards (ASTM F963). Safe for ages 3 and up.

𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲𝘁𝘆: 𝗞𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗜𝘁 𝗖𝗼𝗼𝗹 – For use at room temperature for best squeeze. Never microwave, heat, boil, or leave this toy in a hot car or direct sun. Like any gel-filled item, the contents can heat up, and heated gel can cause burns if the toy is broken or cut. Do not puncture or open. For ages 3+; adult supervision recommended.
𝗚𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗙𝗼𝗰𝘂𝘀, 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀 & 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘆 – Use it for calming anxiety, improving attention, or just having fun. Ideal for classrooms, offices, therapy, or on-the-go sensory play.

𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗥𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗚𝘂𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗲 – We stand behind every cube. If there's a manufacturing defect with your cube, we’ll replace it fast – just text us a picture to the number on every box, and we will replace it.

reviews.name: Lindsay Phillips
reviews.title: Great NeeDoh alternative
reviews.body: I bought this as a cheaper alternative to a NeeDoh cube, and I’m impressed. The size is large, the squish is satisfying, and it has that same stress-relieving feel that makes it hard to put down. It slowly returns to its shape and feels durable so far.

reviews.name: liz
reviews.title: 20/10 will recommend!
reviews.body: I waited a couple weeks to see how this held up even though I didn’t want to. I was a huge needoh fan before they went viral, I had the diamond shape (my favorite) then tons of nice cubes. This big block is SUPERIOR! 20/10 I will always recommend! It’s got a great squeeze, firm, it’s pretty! Doesn’t warm up too much but does get softer the more you play with it but will stiffen back up when cold or left alone. No smell! The most recent squishys I’ve gotten for my kids since they’ve all gone viral smell terrible! It’s holding up great and durable! American company, made by a dad 100% approved!

reviews.name: JDR
reviews.title: Pretty good a little stiffer then expected.
reviews.body: Pretty good, I think its worth $20.Its also bigger than expected, and stiffer or harder than I thought. It got air bubbles pretty fast but I don't mind them.

reviews.name: Cara Davis
reviews.title: Best EVER
reviews.body: I absolutely love this squishy cube! I’m almost 30 years old, and I can confidently say this is not just for kids. It’s become my favorite fidget item.
